title: Irregular Number Patterns
description: This rule raises an issue when underscores (_) are used to break a number into irregular subgroups. No issue will be raised on binary numbers (starting with 0b or 0B).
recommendation: Avoid using underscores (_) to break a number into irregular subgroups.
impact: Irregular number patterns can indicate errors and may lead to security vulnerabilities.

checks.message: Avoid using underscores (_) to break a number into irregular subgroups.
